blended.narrative: Shanty Creek is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 4.9 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 190 ft. Looking ahead, 35 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 4" of snow, highs of 36°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 9" of heavy snow, highs of 28°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 14" of heavy snow, highs of 27°F. Expect powder.
Tuesday: 2.6" of snow, highs of 17°F. Expect powder.
